discussion_posts.name: webguru77777
discussion_posts.content:
For beginners, don't be frustrated if you weren't able to solve it.
I have solved 400+ problems, but it looks like a medium problem for me.
Hint: It's a DFS problem. If the next cell is out of boundary or water, then increase the perimeter by 1.

discussion_posts.name: SanvuSarvesh
discussion_posts.content: If you\'re finding any land then add 4 in your answer and also check wether (i-1,j) or (i,j-1) were land or not, if yes then subtract -2 for each. At the end print your answer.
